concerns.analysis: There is a duplication of the body content from the first section of the document. The heading 'NEW 911 BOARD MEMBERS' and its accompanying text regarding the swearing-in of members appear at the very beginning of the document body (after the Table of Contents) and then again immediately following the masthead image ('NC 911 Board Monthly Dispatch'). This is a repetition of identical body content.
concerns.source_pdf_quote:
NEW 911 BOARD MEMBERS

Four new NC 911 Board members were sworn in on February 28, 2025 at the February 911 Board Meeting. Please join us in welcoming new 911 Board Members Jason Compton, Heather Hallmark, Michael James, and Joey Nelson.
concerns.output_quote: The text block starting with 'NEW 911 BOARD MEMBERS' and 'Four new NC 911 Board members...' appears twice in the body of the HTML output, once before the main masthead image and once after it.
concerns.location: Start of document body, before and after the masthead banner image.
